UC-001.Action: Browses product catalog with infinite scroll
UC-001.AcceptanceCriteria: Products load automatically on scroll; grid respects card width; empty state is legible

UC-002.Action: Searches products by text query via chat-style input
UC-002.Goal: Quickly find relevant products using natural language
UC-002.AcceptanceCriteria: Search bar is anchored at page bottom like a chat input; results replace the catalog grid; loading and error states are visible

UC-003.Goal: Find products hands-free via speech recognition
UC-003.AcceptanceCriteria: Voice button toggles recording; transcript appears in search bar; results sync with grid

UC-004.Goal: Inspect a product without leaving the catalog page
UC-004.AcceptanceCriteria: Clicking a card opens modal; modal closes on backdrop or close button; selection resets on close

UC-005.Action: Experiences consistent layout regardless of result count
UC-005.Goal: UI remains proportional and visually stable when results are empty, few, or many
UC-005.AcceptanceCriteria: Search bar and action buttons never stretch horizontally; grid cards maintain max-width; empty state has proper padding
